title: psilocarphus oregonus var. brevissimus
intro: Psilocarphus oregonus var. brevissimus, also known as Oregon woollyhead, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the sunflower family (Asteraceae). This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its potential anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, which can be attributed to the presence of sesquiterpene lactones. The health benefits associated with Psilocarphus oregonus var. brevissimus include its ability to support digestive health, reduce inflammation, and exhibit antioxidant properties. Traditionally, this plant can be used in herbal preparations such as teas, tinctures, and infusions, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy and optimal usage.
